Follow-Up: ER Treatment Advised This field indicates, if the patient has been diagnosed with heart failure and has exhibited symptoms indicative of heart failure since the previous OASIS assessment, patient was advised to get emergency treatment. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x
M1510_HRT_FAILR_NO_ACTN M1510 Heart Fail. Follow-Up: No Action Taken This field indicates, if the patient has been diagnosed with heart failure and has exhibited symptoms indicative of heart failure
